name: phase29_30_polish
outcome_goal: Final polish: enhanced nav, browser history, home manifest, loading states, error boundaries, TypeScript check

jobs.label: p29_enhanced_nav
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/App.tsx.

Enhance the NavBar:
1. Add links: Home, CRM, Objects, Workflows, Editor (Workflows goes to a workflow-builder manifest)
2. Add app switcher dropdown that lists recent manifests from /api/templates
3. Add breadcrumb showing current manifest name
4. Add browser history support: use history.pushState on manifest navigation, listen to popstate events to reload manifest
5. Make NavBar responsive: collapse to hamburger menu on small screens

Also update the home manifest in Postgres to include: IntentBox (A1 4x1), StatRow with platform metrics (B1 4x1), ActivityFeed (C1 2x2), RegistryBrowser (C3 2x2).

Write the updated App.tsx.

jobs.label: p30_final_polish
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Polish pass across all modules:

1. Add loading skeletons to all modules that fetch data: show a pulsing gray rectangle while loading instead of blank space. Add a shared LoadingSkeleton component at src/primitives/LoadingSkeleton.tsx.

2. Ensure all modules handle null/undefined config gracefully — no crashes on missing config keys.

3. Add keyboard shortcuts:
   - Cmd+K: focus RefinementBar (if exists)
   - Escape: close any open panel (ConfigEditor, ModulePalette, ContextMenu)
   - Tab: move focus between modules

4. Verify all CSS uses design tokens (no hardcoded colors).

5. Add a global error boundary in App.tsx that catches and displays errors gracefully.

Write updated files for: LoadingSkeleton.tsx (NEW), App.tsx (error boundary + keyboard shortcuts).

jobs.label: p30_typescript_check
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Run the TypeScript compiler and fix ALL errors:

1. Run: cd Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app && /opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/25.6.1/bin/npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1
2. For each error: read the file, understand the issue, fix it
3. Common fixes:
   - Missing imports: add them
   - Type mismatches: add casts or fix types
   - Missing properties: add optional chaining or defaults
   - world.set() calls: should use world.applyDeltas() or the set() method we added
4. Re-run tsc --noEmit until zero errors
5. Report: number of errors fixed, files modified

Do NOT change any functionality — only fix type errors.
